commands.review_summary:
The PR adds menu-bar currency spend text for the existing Claude/Cursor Extra usage metric preference and extends focused menu-bar metric tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a feature/display enhancement. Source inspection shows current main already has Extra usage metric windows, while the PR adds the missing currency text path.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is appropriate; the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof before human merge review.

target.title: Show extra-usage spend text in menu bar for Claude/Cursor
target.body:
## Fixes

Fixes #1084 — show money spend in the macOS menu bar.

## Summary

- Reuse existing  for a display-only menu-bar enhancement
- When  is selected and  is usable (), render formatted spend text, for example 
- When provider cost is missing or unusable, fall back to the existing percent display
- Scope is intentionally limited to Claude/Cursor through the existing  preference support
- No provider fetcher, network, or UsageStore refresh changes

## Scope

- Display/menu-bar text only
- No provider fetcher changes
- No UsageStore refresh changes
- No OpenCode/OpenCodeGo changes
- No Kimi changes
- No MiniMax changes
